testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Notifications: Bell Structure notifications wrapper exists in header
OpenSparrow – Notifications: Bell Structure badge element exists
OpenSparrow – Notifications: Bell Structure dropdown container exists
OpenSparrow – Notifications: Bell Structure notification list exists
OpenSparrow – Notifications: Bell Structure badge displays a number
OpenSparrow – Notifications: Interaction clicking bell opens the dropdown when it is closed
testcase.classname: clicking bell opens the dropdown when it is closed

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Notifications: Interaction dropdown has a header section
OpenSparrow – Notifications: Interaction notification list is ul element
OpenSparrow – Notifications: Interaction if notifications exist: list has items
testcase.classname: if notifications exist: list has items

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Notifications: Interaction bell present on grid page too
testcase.classname: bell present on grid page too

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Notifications: API page load triggers GET to api/notifications.php
testcase.classname: page load triggers GET to api/notifications.php

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Notifications: API API response has expected shape

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: response carries a notifications array: expected undefined to be an array

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: response carries a notifications array: expected undefined to be an array at Proxy.<anonymous> (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:139122:9) at Proxy.an (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:80081:10) at Proxy.chainableMethodWrapper (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:79192:49) at Context.eval (webpack://opensparrow-e2e/./cypress/e2e/notifications.cy.js:115:69) at <unknown> (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:118738:17) at Context.shouldFn (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:118778:37)
